title: CHOCOLATE BLOCKS - 3 ingredients
excerpt: You're never too old to learn. So my kitchen kid, Herman Lensing, and I got chatting and he told me about chocolate blocks with 3 ingredients. I made it and it's a winner and delicious. A quick dessert that I think tastes lovely with custard, or just a treat for when a sweet craving …
html:
You're never too old to learn. So my kitchen kid, Herman Lensing, and I got chatting and he told me about chocolate blocks with 3 ingredients. I made it and it's a winner and delicious. A quick dessert that I think tastes lovely with custard, or just a treat for when a sweet craving hits you.

 

INGREDIENTS:

  • 250 ml Nutella
  • 100 ml cake flour
  • 2 eggs

NOW:

  1. put everything in a mixing bowl.
  2. whisk with a hand whisk until just combined
  3. spray an oven dish with Spray and Cook and pour the mixture into the dish
  4. bake for 20 minutes at 180°C
  5. let it cool down and enjoy the deliciousness
  6. I spread the leftover Nutella from the jar on top
